mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts corporate profit margins through wage growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative when UNRATE declines by more than 0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and GDP signals expanding capacity utilization that drives corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative when both INDPRO and GDPC1 show positive growth.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts during late-cycle expansions signal sustained consumer demand that lifts equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are negative during periods of rising HOUST.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in the CPI above 230 signals inflationary pressures that force central banks to raise rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 230.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in nonfarm payrolls signals robust economic activity that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative when PAYEMS increases by more than 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real sales and housing starts signals strong consumer demand that lifts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative when both RSAFS and HOUST show positive growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in industrial production signals weakening capacity utilization that reduces corporate earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are positive when INDPRO declines by more than 1.0pp.
